creator: rsimmons@mail.wlcg.com
text:
The ports, imap-uw and cclient both are build from a BETA development snapshot, and the snapshot has been updated.  The port can no longer find the appropriate file on the different uw mirrors, or on any of the freebsd servers.  I have tried running the port against the new snapshot and it fails.

Fix: 

Update the patches for the port for the new snapshot that's available on the uw site and mirrors.
How-To-Repeat: cvsup to the point in the source tree for the date in the "System" above, Apr 5 15:51 or even today, Apr 9 and try to make install in either of these ports.
